title: IIT Kharagpur Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Scientific Administrative Assistant Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur (IIT Kharagpur) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Scientific Administrative Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Kharagpur Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can ap...
